## Evidence / 検証

```text
command => result
```

- [ ] All affected skills pass validation.
- [ ] Deterministic tests and relevant installer smoke tests pass.
- [ ] English and Japanese public guides are aligned.
- [ ] Visual changes include representative screenshots.
- [ ] No confidential design, account, path, order, or credential data is present.
- [ ] Asset licenses and attribution are complete.
